# persistent-draft

## Plugin reference

- Description: Generic localStorage-backed useState drop-in with optional entity scope and TTL auto-expiry. All useDraft calls sharing the same key stay in sync within and across tabs.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `useDraft`
